coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of morning gratitude and aspirational intent, yet the abysmal completion rates for Sleep and Training protocols, coupled with the missing evening reflections, indicate a profound disconnect between your declared intentions and your embodied execution, specifically collapsing at the point of physical discipline and recovery. The root cause is a catastrophic failure in self-management and boundary setting around digital inputs and evening wind-down, directly sabotaging the physical and mental resilience required to sustain elite-level performance and manifesting as "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness" in your own words. Tonight, at 9:00 PM sharp, place your phone and all devices in a separate room and do not retrieve them until after your Sovereign Morning is complete.
